name: Tropical Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 jar (4 oz.) maraschino cherries, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl; stir well until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
2. Place the mixture in a freezer-safe container and freeze until firm.
3. To serve, partially thaw the fruit mixture by placing it in a punch bowl.
4. Break the thawed fruit into chunks.
5. Add ginger ale and stir gently until the mixture becomes slushy.
Makes 12 cups.
